auth.useAdminAccount: Use your admin account to access the dashboard.

users.title: Users
users.addNew: Add a new user account to the system.
users.editDescription: Update user profile details or set a new password.
users.newUserDescription: Fill all required fields to create a user.
users.name: Name
users.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

roles.title: Roles
roles.createDescription: Define a role and attach permissions for admin access control.
roles.editDescription: Update role name and permissions mappings.
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete role "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
roles.adminRoleProtected: Admin role is protected and cannot be edited or deleted.

plans.title: Plans
plans.createDescription: Add a new student plan type.
plans.deleteConfirm: Delete plan "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

activityLogs.title: Activity Logs
activityLogs.noHistory: No activity history found for this item.
activityLogs.noChanges: No before/after changes captured for this event.
activityLogs.subject: Subject

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Operational snapshot for your admin area.
dashboard.description: Protected with auth:web. Manage system theme from the Settings page.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Manage your WhatsApp session and send quick test messages.
whatsapp.deleteConfirm: Delete device "{name}"? This will reset the current session.
whatsapp.apiMissingHelp: Set WHATSAPP_API_URL (and optional WHATSAPP_API_KEY) in your environment file.
whatsapp.step2: Tap Menu on Android, or Settings on iPhone.
whatsapp.step3: Tap Linked devices, then Link a device.
whatsapp.step4: Point your phone at this screen to scan the QR code.
whatsapp.connected: Device is connected. You can send a message now.

settings.title: Settings
settings.brandingDescription: Control app name, tagline, and branding assets used in sidebar and login.
settings.recommendedDarkLogo: Use a light-colored logo for dark backgrounds.
settings.localizationDescription: Set default language and interface direction (LTR/RTL).
settings.dateTimeDescription: Set global timezone and formatting standards.
settings.appearanceDescription: Customize mode, component shape, and accent color for the active theme.

uploads.allowedFormats: Allowed: JPG, PNG, WEBP. Max size: 2MB.

notifications.saveFailedDetail: Could not save settings. Please try again.
notifications.loadFailedDetail: Could not load table data. Please try again.
notifications.requestFailedDetail: Something went wrong. Please try again.
notifications.uploadFailedDetail: Could not upload image. Please use JPG, PNG, or WEBP under 2MB.

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.description: You do not have permission to access this page.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you requested could not be found.

expired.title: Session Expired
expired.description: Your session has expired. Please refresh and try again.

serverError.title: Server Error
serverError.description: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again in a moment.

unavailable.title: Service Unavailable
unavailable.description: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
